items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, Jerome Friedman
items.note: Chapter 3 covers shrinkage methods—L2 Ridge and L1 Lasso in the penalized-loss framework.

items.title: Regression Shrinkage and Selection via the Lasso (Tibshirani, 1996)
items.author: Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Foundational L1 sparsity paper; complements the L2 Ridge literature for the full L1/L2 story.

items.title: scikit-learn regularization user guide
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical guidance on penalty types, alpha parameter, and preprocessing for penalized linear models.
